ValidationRule.description: Billing Rate and Carrier Rate must be set when load transitions to quoted status or beyond. Rate information is required for freight pricing.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Status__c)), OR(Status__c = "quoted", Status__c = "tendered", Status__c = "accepted", Status__c = "dispatched", Status__c = "in_transit", Status__c = "delivered", Status__c = "pod_captured", Status__c = "invoiced", Status__c = "settled", Status__c = "completed"), OR(ISBLANK(Billing_Rate__c), ISBLANK(Carrier_Rate__c)) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Both Billing Rate and Carrier Rate are required before quoting a load. Please set rates for shipper and carrier.
